== Suppressed Messages ==

# Display name for Sweden not available in sv-SE on tx server — acceptable
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#SE

# Auto-generated links in the IG narrative point to the canonical URL which is not live yet.
# These will resolve once the IG is published at https://fhir.inera.se/ig/template
The link 'StructureDefinition-IneraPatient.html' for "fake generated link for Implementation Guide" cannot be resolved
The link 'Patient-IneraPatientExample.html' for "fake generated link for Implementation Guide" cannot be resolved

# Standard xhtml fragments not included — acceptable when using a custom local template
The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
